product_overview: REST API en Flask para una plataforma de capacitación gamificada sobre seguridad, con autenticación por roles, banco de preguntas, sesiones de juego, gamificación y reportes. El backend sirve a clientes web/Android y soporta modos de autenticación local o Cognito.
core_goals: Proveer autenticación segura y control de acceso por roles.
Permitir gestión administrativa de usuarios, temas y preguntas.
Habilitar sesiones de trivia con scoring calculado en servidor y uso de comodines.
Exponer rankings, insignias y tablas de posiciones para gamificación.
Ofrecer reportes de supervisor y exportación CSV.
Garantizar salud operativa del servicio mediante endpoint de healthcheck.

features.name: Health
features.description: Permite verificar que la API está levantada y respondiendo correctamente.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/health -> Receive 200 with { status: 'ok', service: 'trivia-seguridad-api' }
GET /api/v1/health -> Receive 200 or detect service unavailability if the endpoint cannot be reached

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Gestiona el inicio de sesión local con JWT y la consulta del perfil del usuario autenticado.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid email/password in AUTH_MODE=local -> Receive 200 with access_token and user profile -> GET /api/v1/auth/me with Bearer token -> Receive 200 with authenticated user data
POST /api/v1/auth/login with missing email or password -> Receive 422 validation error
POST /api/v1/auth/login with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 invalid credentials
POST /api/v1/auth/login while AUTH_MODE=cognito -> Receive 400 login not allowed in cognito mode
GET /api/v1/auth/me without a token or with an expired/invalid token -> Receive 401 unauthorized

features.name: User Management
features.description: Permite a administradores listar, crear, consultar, actualizar y desactivar usuarios de forma lógica.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/auth/login with admin credentials -> Receive 200 with Bearer token -> GET /api/v1/users with admin token -> Receive 200 with paginated user list -> GET /api/v1/users/{user_id} -> Receive 200 with user details
POST /api/v1/auth/login with admin credentials -> Receive 200 with Bearer token -> POST /api/v1/users with email, full_name, role, and password -> Receive 201 with created user
POST /api/v1/auth/login with non-admin credentials -> Receive 200 with Bearer token -> GET /api/v1/users -> Receive 403 forbidden for non-admin role
POST /api/v1/users with duplicate email -> Receive 409 conflict
PATCH /api/v1/users/{user_id} with invalid role -> Receive 422 validation error
DELETE /api/v1/users/{user_id} attempting to deactivate own account -> Receive 422 cannot self-deactivate
GET /api/v1/users/{user_id} for an unknown user -> Receive 404 not found

features.name: Topics
features.description: Permite consultar temas autenticados y administrar temas de capacitación con permisos de administrador.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/auth/login with admin credentials -> Receive 200 with Bearer token -> GET /api/v1/topics -> Receive 200 with active topics -> POST /api/v1/topics with name, description, and level -> Receive 201 with created topic
POST /api/v1/auth/login with authenticated non-admin credentials -> Receive 200 with Bearer token -> GET /api/v1/topics -> Receive 200 with active topics
POST /api/v1/auth/login with non-admin credentials -> Receive 200 with Bearer token -> POST /api/v1/topics -> Receive 403 forbidden for non-admin role
POST /api/v1/topics with missing name -> Receive 422 validation error
PATCH /api/v1/topics/{topic_id} for an unknown topic -> Receive 404 not found
DELETE /api/v1/topics/{topic_id} for an unknown topic -> Receive 404 not found

features.name: Question Bank
features.description: Permite a administradores gestionar preguntas con validación estricta de 4 opciones y un único acierto, incluyendo importación masiva atómica.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/auth/login with admin credentials -> Receive 200 with Bearer token -> POST /api/v1/questions with text, topic_id, difficulty, and 4 choices -> Receive 201 with created question

POST /api/v1/auth/login with admin credentials -> Receive 200 with Bearer token -> GET /api/v1/questions with filters and pagination -> Receive 200 with paginated question list -> GET /api/v1/questions/{question_id} -> Receive 200 with question and answers
POST /api/v1/auth/login with non-admin credentials -> Receive 200 with Bearer token -> GET /api/v1/questions -> Receive 403 forbidden for non-admin role
POST /api/v1/questions with fewer or more than 4 choices -> Receive 422 validation error
POST /api/v1/questions with choices containing zero or multiple correct answers -> Receive 422 validation error
POST /api/v1/questions/import with an empty items array -> Receive 422 validation error
POST /api/v1/questions/import with one invalid item in the batch -> Receive 422 and no questions are created
PATCH /api/v1/questions/{question_id} with invalid difficulty or choices -> Receive 422 validation error
DELETE /api/v1/questions/{question_id} for an unknown question -> Receive 404 not found

features.name: Game Sessions
features.description: Gestiona el ciclo de juego de trivia, desde el inicio de la sesión hasta respuestas, comodines y abandono, con puntuación calculada en servidor.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/auth/login with a valid user -> Receive 200 with Bearer token -> POST /api/v1/game/sessions with topic_id and num_questions -> Receive 201 with session state and first question -> GET /api/v1/game/sessions/{session_id} -> Receive 200 with current session state -> POST /api/v1/game/sessions/{session_id}/answer with choice_id -> Receive 200 with answer result and next state
POST /api/v1/auth/login with a valid user -> Receive 200 with Bearer token -> POST /api/v1/game/sessions with topic_id only -> Receive 422 missing num_questions or invalid payload
POST /api/v1/game/sessions/{session_id}/answer with missing choice_id -> Receive 422 validation error
POST /api/v1/game/sessions/{session_id}/lifeline with type=fifty_fifty -> Receive 200 with updated state
POST /api/v1/game/sessions/{session_id}/lifeline with missing type -> Receive 422 validation error
GET /api/v1/game/sessions/{session_id} for a session belonging to another user -> Receive 403 forbidden
POST /api/v1/game/sessions/{session_id}/abandon -> Receive 200 with final abandoned session state

features.name: Gamification
features.description: Expone rangos, catálogo de insignias y leaderboard filtrado por periodo para motivar el progreso del usuario.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/auth/login with a valid user -> Receive 200 with Bearer token -> GET /api/v1/ranks -> Receive 200 with rank scale and current user's rank -> GET /api/v1/badges -> Receive 200 with badge catalog and unlocked status
POST /api/v1/auth/login with a valid user -> Receive 200 with Bearer token -> GET /api/v1/leaderboard?period=week -> Receive 200 with weekly leaderboard
GET /api/v1/leaderboard?period=invalid with a valid token -> Receive 422 invalid period
GET /api/v1/badges without a valid token -> Receive 401 unauthorized

features.name: Supervisor Reports
features.description: Permite a supervisores y administradores consultar resúmenes, reportes por usuario, reportes por tema y exportación CSV.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/auth/login with supervisor credentials -> Receive 200 with Bearer token -> GET /api/v1/reports/overview -> Receive 200 with aggregate training overview -> GET /api/v1/reports/users -> Receive 200 with per-user report items -> GET /api/v1/reports/topics -> Receive 200 with accuracy by topic
POST /api/v1/auth/login with supervisor credentials -> Receive 200 with Bearer token -> GET /api/v1/reports/users/{user_id} -> Receive 200 with detailed user report
POST /api/v1/auth/login with supervisor credentials -> Receive 200 with Bearer token -> GET /api/v1/reports/export/users.csv -> Receive 200 with CSV attachment
POST /api/v1/auth/login with non-supervisor credentials -> Receive 200 with Bearer token -> GET /api/v1/reports/overview -> Receive 403 role below supervisor
GET /api/v1/reports/users/{user_id} for an unknown user -> Receive 404 not found

features.name: Health
features.description: Liveness probe for the API service.

endpoints.description: Returns service status.

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Local JWT login (AUTH_MODE=local) and current-user profile. In cognito mode login returns 400.

endpoints.description: Authenticate with email/password, returns Bearer JWT and user profile.
Returns the authenticated user's profile with stats.

features.name: User Management
features.description: Admin-only CRUD over users with logical (soft) delete and pagination.

endpoints.description: List users with optional role/q filters and pagination (page, per_page).
Create a user (default role guarda).
Get a single user with stats.
Update full_name, role, is_active or password.
Logical deactivation (is_active=false). Cannot self-deactivate.

features.name: Topics
features.description: Training topics/modules. Read for any authenticated user; write for admin.

endpoints.description: List active topics (include_inactive=1 to include inactive).
Create a topic (admin only).
Update a topic (admin only).
Logical deactivation of a topic (admin only).

features.name: Question Bank
features.description: Admin-only question CRUD plus atomic bulk import. Each question requires exactly 4 choices with exactly one correct.

endpoints.description: List questions with topic_id/difficulty/q filters and pagination.
Create a question (4 choices, exactly one correct).
Atomic bulk import of questions.

response_schema.422: Empty items or per-item validation error

endpoints.description: Get a single question with answers.
Update question fields and/or replace choices.
Logical deactivation of a question.

features.name: Game Sessions
features.description: Quiz gameplay lifecycle (start, answer, lifeline, abandon) with server-side scoring. Available to all roles.

endpoints.description: Start a new session for a topic with num_questions (capped by GAME_MAX_QUESTIONS).
Get current session state.
Submit a choice for the current question; server scores it.
Use a lifeline (fifty_fifty | skip).
Abandon a session.

features.name: Gamification
features.description: Ranks, badges catalog and leaderboard with period filtering.

endpoints.description: Full rank scale plus current user's rank.
Badge catalog flagged with which the user has unlocked.
Leaderboard by period (all|month|week) with limit.

features.name: Supervisor Reports
features.description: Supervisor/admin reporting overview, per-user and per-topic accuracy, and CSV export.

endpoints.description: Aggregate training overview.
Per-user report.
Detailed report for a user.
Accuracy by topic; flags critical topics.
CSV export of the per-user report.

known_limitations.issue: Pagination query params parsed with int() without guarding in list_users
known_limitations.impact: Non-numeric page/per_page raises ValueError -> HTTP 500 instead of 422
If secrets are unset in production, tokens are signed with a known key

known_limitations.issue: Write-on-every-request updates last_activity_at and commits per authenticated call
known_limitations.impact: One DB write per authenticated request; potential contention under load
